name: Chocolate Cake/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare two 9-inch cake pans by rubbing each with butter, sprinkling with flour, and tapping out the excess.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Mix together with a wooden spoon.
4. In a small bowl, beat eggs, milk, oil, and vanilla extract until well combined.
5. Gradually add boiling water to the egg mixture and mix until smooth.
6. Add the wet ingredients to the flour mixture and fold until smooth.
7. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove cakes from pans and cool on wire racks.
Chocolate Frosting:
1. Sift confectioners' sugar and cocoa together into a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, combine 1 cup of the sugar mixture with softened butter and 1 tablespoon of heavy cream. Beat until smooth.
3. Add another cup of the sugar mixture and another tablespoon of heavy cream, beating well.
4. Continue adding ingredients in batches, beating until all are combined and frosting is fluffy.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Spread frosting on one layer of cake. Top with second layer and spread frosting over top and sides to cover completely.
